DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SANDRA DEES' MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING FEE OF EXPERT AND FOR SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CCP 2034.470 IS GRANTED IN PART; DENIED IN PART. THE COURT BELIEVES THAT DR. MIMRAN'S $2,000 RATE FOR THE FIRST HOUR OF DEPOSITION AND PREPARATION IS EXCESSIVE AND RE-SETS IT AT $1,350/HOUR. SUBSEQUENT HOURS WILL BE BILLED AT HIS STANDARD RATE OF $1,000. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
